rows.notes: H50 must be an explicit negative closeout packet rather than an implied consequence of R52 alone.
H50 should close the lane only because R51 stayed narrow-positive while R52 stayed exact but failed the bounded-value test.
The shared control surfaces should make H50 current so unattended work starts from the real closeout state.
Future executor-entry planning remains stored but inactive after the negative H50 closeout.
